description: An emergency overflight tasking order has been issued to target Philadelphia. Read the specification document at ~/Desktop/overflight_spec.txt to extract the initial satellite state (SAR_1) and the target geographic coordinates. Compute the exact along-track velocity change (ΔV) required at the initial epoch so the satellite overflies the target at 40.0°N, 75.0°W (with a longitude tolerance of 0.05 degrees) after a propagation period of 2.8 days. Save the GMAT script to ~/Documents/missions/sar_targeting.script and write the results to ~/GMAT_output/overflight_report.txt using the keys: maneuver_dv_m_s (in meters per second), final_latitude_deg, and final_longitude_deg. Login: username=ga, password=password123
